DECLARATION OF FULVIO A PICERNO IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S OPPOS. TO DEFT GRANT YEE LEONG'S MTN TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TINDLE, KURT A.

DISCOVERY 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT GRANT YEE LEONG'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION IS DENIED ON THE FOLLOWING GROUNDS: 1) NOTICE DOES NOT STATE PROPER C.C.P. SECTION FOR BRINGING MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH DEFENDANT'S DEMAND AS REQUIRED BY CRC RULE 3.1110; 2) DEFENDANT FAILED TO SUBMIT EVIDENCE THAT DR. STRASSBERG IS A "LICENSED PHYSICIAN OR OTHER APPROPRIATE LICENSED HEALTH CARE PRACTITIONER," AS REQUIRED BY C.C.P. SECTION 2032.020; 3) DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR IME DATED OCTOBER 15, 2012 DOES NOT COMPLY WITH C.C.P. SECTION 2032.220; AND 4) NO GOOD CAUSE SHOWN THAT SECOND IME OF PLAINTIFF IS NECESSARY. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF LATE FEES IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. REBECCA WOODSON, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Fulvio A. Picerno, Law Offices of Leonard S. Becker, 925.837.6900, appearing for the Plaintiff.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant GRANT YEE LEONG's Motion to Compel Attendance at Independent Medical Examination is DENIED on the following grounds: 1) Notice does not state proper C.C.P. section for bringing motion for order compelling compliance with defendant's demand as required by CRC Rule 3.1110; 2) Defendant failed to submit evidence that Dr. Strassberg is a "licensed physician or other appropriate licensed health care practitioner," as required by C.C.P. section 2032.020; 3) Defendant's Request for IME dated October 15, 2012 does not comply with C.C.P. section 2032.220; and 4) No good cause shown that second IME of plaintiff is necessary. Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED. Defendant's request for reimbursement of late fees is DENIED. Order signed. Rebecca Woodson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Fulvio A. Picerno, Law Offices of Leonard S. Becker, 510.886.1996, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Jay Brown, appearing by Court Call for the Defendant Leong.

Ruling: The Motion to Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination is continued to January 24, 2013 at 9:00 am. Nils Rosenquest, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED.

DEFENDANT GRANT LEONG'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination is continued to January 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No later than 4 p.m., January 3, 2013, the moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date of January 10, 2013, or the motion will be denied. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =302/JPT
